coupon.source_phrase_block: New England Aquarium Academic Year Pass Program - Sept.- May 22 -This pass allows 4 people (adult, senior, child, college)admittance to aquarium at 50% off per ticket .Children under three years of age are admitted free.- Valid only for Aquarium admission.- This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. New England Aquarium Summer Pass Program- May 26- Sept. 4 - pass admits up to four people (adult, senior, child, college) at $20.00 each. Chlidren under three years of age are admitted free. This pass is valid on weekdays only .
